title: lygodium lanceolatum
intro: Lygodium lanceolatum, also known as the Australian climbing fern or lace fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Lygodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Lygodium lanceolatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its ability to act as a natural antioxidant, protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. Lygodium lanceolatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
